name: Osbert Buckley

sheet.name: Osbert Buckley
sheet.background_story:
To his friends, Osbert is a warrior who came across a cool looking mask while scouring the swamps one day.

What they do not realize is that he has long studied the art of communicating with the dead, an art he uses to discover much about the secrets of this forsaken land.  

Some died by their own hand, others were sacrificed ... all have their story to tell which helps Osbert become more knowledgeable about this world than most others.

One day, Osbert hopes to learn how to overcome death itself ... apparently some sorcerer called Merlin holds this knowledge ...
